rules.reason: signed-in users manage the chart of accounts they created
signed-in users manage journals they created, including the draft->posted transition guarded on the schema
signed-in users manage line items on journals they created
signed-in users manage recurring journal templates they created
the accounts page is public; it shows a sign-in prompt to visitors
the journals page is public; it shows a sign-in prompt to visitors
the trial balance page is public; it shows a sign-in prompt to visitors and the page itself scopes the report to the signed-in owner (see objects/site/trial_balance.py)
setup-accounts is public execute like every other finance page object; the object itself requires a signed-in identity and verifies the entity belongs to the caller before creating any account
reversing a posted journal is the doctrine-correct correction; the object itself enforces owner-or-admin on the target journal
